description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a minimalist white brick exterior. The structure features large, grid-style windows on both visible sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entryway is marked by a single door with two wall-mounted lanterns and a small step, leading to a fenced-in yard with green artificial turf. The backyard area includes a patio with outdoor furniture, a hammock, and a large umbrella, all enclosed by a white fence. The house appears to be a single story with a rooftop area that may be accessible. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living space.
description: A modern, single-story white brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and fenced outdoor living areas featuring patio furniture and a hammock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entry door, two lanterns, and the fenced yard with a large umbrella and green turf.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the glass patio doors, outdoor seating, and the hammock outside the fenced area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying three large windows and the backyard patio area with the umbrella and hammock.
description_view_3: Narrow end view showing the depth of the house and the side profile of the hammock and umbrella.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with two wall lanterns, small step, no porch, minimalist design
